title: TrainEvent
description: Normalized train-position / delay event emitted by every ingestion adapter.

event_time.description: When the train was actually there (event-time, not processing-time).

received_time.description: When the system received it; (received - event) gives data-age.

delay_min.description: Minutes late vs schedule at event_time.

position_confidence.description: Confidence after map-matching; low values down-weight the event.
